stemHtml: What is the main objective of the International Air Transport Association (IATA)?

options.a: To defend airline pilots and cabin crew members, in case an Operator takes legal action against them.
options.b: To investigate serious technical incidents and provide airlines with specialised aeronautical lawyers.
options.c: To support many areas of aviation activity and help formulate industry policy on critical aviation issues.
options.d: To issue mandatory technical regulations with which airlines must comply.
